name: Reddy Nikhil
professional_summary: Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable microservices and full-stack applications using Java/Spring Boot and modern frontend frameworks. Skilled in secure payment integrations, cloud-native architectures, and performance optimization across e-commerce and healthcare domains, with a focus on scalability, reliability, and clean system design.

responsibilities: Designed and developed ECP, an end-to-end e-commerce and corporate training platform for B2B clients.
Built Spring Boot backend services using GraphQL APIs, Spring Security, JPA/Hibernate, and PostgreSQL.
Implemented a RAG-based AI chatbot using vector database and Node.js with GraphQL APIs.
Integrated Absorb LMS, Stripe, and Authorize.net for SSO and secure payment workflows.
Enhanced security using HashiCorp Vault and automated CI/CD with GitHub Actions, Docker, and Nginx.
Led development of Spring Boot microservices for EMR systems with HIPAA and FHIR compliance.
Optimized patient scheduling workflows improving performance by 40%.
Enhanced backend performance using PostgreSQL tuning, Redis caching, and MongoDB.
Deployed containerized services on AWS EKS with CI/CD using Jenkins, Docker, and Terraform.
Implemented logging and monitoring using ELK Stack and Splunk.
Developed Spring Boot microservices for banking systems improving transaction efficiency.
Built secure REST and GraphQL APIs using OAuth2 and JWT.
Improved performance using SQL optimization and Redis caching.
Implemented event-driven architecture using Apache Kafka.
Deployed services on AWS EKS with Docker and CI/CD pipelines.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer and Information Sciences
